scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @bay/web" "npm run start:dev -w @bay/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bay/api && npm run build -w @bay/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @bay/web && npm run lint -w @bay/api
scripts.start: concurrently -n WEB,API -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w @bay/web" "npm run start:prod -w @bay/api"
